title: algoliasearch@3.19.2 breaks build ⚠️
body:
Hello lovely humans, [algoliasearch](https://www.npmjs.com/package/algoliasearch) just published its new version 3.19.2.
State Failing tests :warning:
Dependency algoliasearch
New version 3.19.2
Type dependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build kept failing**. **It looks like your project, in its current form, is malfunctioning** and this update didn’t really change that. I don’t want to leave you in the dark about updates though. I recommend you get your project passing and then check the impact of this update again. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 8 commits . - [`9f46537`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/commit/9f4653711c09e103513b0d069c1178f8ed442063) 3.19.2 - [`dbdb1d5`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/commit/dbdb1d546ba9acf4b534d4fa1a91e8c7d8b79278) Merge branch 'develop' - [`e6fbd84`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/commit/e6fbd84dfc411dd7e6f8eb71eef9d70bb425170b) Merge pull request #362 from algolia/fix/renameSearchFacet-searchForFacetValues - [`482aa44`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/commit/482aa44494aa72276facda134e02c628afc149d1) fix(searchFacet): rename searchFacet to searchForFacetValues - [`8ddb2c3`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/commit/8ddb2c3fe448ac2899f437111ea921ff59964947) Merge pull request #360 from algoliareadmebot/master - [`29d0957`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/commit/29d09572a75cd405d03340e324a30999b98232fb) docs(README): automatic update - [`01e154e`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/commit/01e154ecfb197bea21583c73c4e972b5f0484b66) Create PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md - [`596cb77`](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/commit/596cb77a72b830a4c1a8f5a66e4e25cd37fd61dc) Create ISSUE_TEMPLATE.md See the [full diff](https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/compare/d20733a599d0d7276301b758c9db651bb80a3d1a...9f4653711c09e103513b0d069c1178f8ed442063). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
